prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约2010→1685→973→569→431，呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近4年累计前移约1579名，2025年基准位次约431名，反映该校 在辽宁物理类考生中竞争热度持续攀升；2021–2025年物理类计划人数分别为105→92→78→52→32，持续大幅缩招；2026年计划21人，较2025年再缩招34.4% ，供给端显著收紧，进一步加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名：2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第13→2024年第16→2025年 第14→2026年第12，近年排名稳中有升，2026年回升至第12位，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合 热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度维持高位；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年位次已显著回升，断档影响基本消退；第 五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个学科：力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、土木工程A、电气工程A 等，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业持续高热推荐，与哈工大优势学科高 度匹配；辽宁省2026年物理类考生约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争基数稳定；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，与辽宁省 相邻，地域接近性带来天然报考偏好；2025年在辽宁招生51人（占全国总招生8.5%），属该校省外招生占比较高的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年物理类计划大幅缩招34.4%、学校软科排名回升至第12位、抖音高热关注度、以及工科王牌专业持续高热等关键因素，竞争将进一步加剧。，结合学 校声誉提升与高关注度做小幅正向修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约357名，区间316–398名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2010 → 1685 → 973 → 569 → 431, showing a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1579 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 431, reflecting continuously rising competition among Physics Category candidates in Liaoning. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 105 → 92 → 78 → 52 → 32, with a continuous significant reduction. The 2026 plan is 21 students, a further 34.4% reduction from 2025, significantly tightening supply and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking: 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, with stable or rising rankings in recent years, returning to 12th in 2026, firmly among the top engineering universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive heat ranking is 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high application attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but the ranking significantly recovered in 2025, with the impact of the gap largely dissipated. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly matching HIT's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, Liaoning's Physics Category candidates are approximately 143,600, basically the same as 2025, with a stable competition base. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, adjacent to Liaoning Province, with geographical proximity creating natural application preference. In 2025, it enrolled 51 students in Liaoning (accounting for 8.5% of total national enrollment), making it one of the provinces with a relatively high proportion of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant 34.4% reduction in Physics Category enrollment for 2026, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 12th, high Douyin heat attention, and the sustained high popularity of core engineering majors, competition will further intensify. Combined with the university's reputation improvement and high attention, a small positive correction is made, predicting the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 to be approximately 357, with a range of 316–398.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class Shenzhen Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 316–398, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class as the main target, and Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Future Technology Top Class as a stretch goal. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 300), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 top classes. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (about 400), it is recommended to use Tier 2 as a safety option. HIT's 2026 Physics Category enrollment is sharply reduced to 21 students, making competition extremely intense; applicants should fully assess ranking compatibility.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 989 → 1065 → 1143 → 767 → 601. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight backward shift, but from 2024 onward, a significant forward shift occurred, with a cumulative forward movement of about 542 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 601. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 6 → 16 → 18 → 24 → 10, showing considerable fluctuation. In 2026, the plan is 18 students, an 80% increase compared to 2025, indicating a clear relaxation on the supply side and some relief in competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is 12th, firmly among the top universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), maintaining a high level of overall attention. The History Category has relatively few majors, but the overall brand effect of the university remains attractive. HIT is known for engineering, and the History Category offers the Economic Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance), covering directions such as Business Administration, Accounting, and Law. Among related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A, and Business Administration (though not separately rated, relies on the management discipline cluster), with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2024 to 2025, the popularity of Economic Management majors is in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, with the popularity of Finance/Economics/Economy majors tending to stabilize. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province is about 56,400, roughly the same as in 2025. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, adjacent to Liaoning Province, and the geographical proximity brings a preference for application. In 2025, it enrolled 10 students in History Category in Liaoning, expanding to 18 in 2026. The increase in enrollment scale is conducive to more Liaoning examinees applying.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings, the significant 80% expansion of the 2026 History Category plan, and the stable high reputation of the university, the expansion effect will significantly alleviate competitive pressure. With a slight negative correction based on the university's brand appeal, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 History Category is about 869, with a range of 770 to 968.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Same as above (History Category has only 1 enrollment major category; all examinees enter this experimental class and then分流).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 770–968, the History Category has only one enrollment major category, the Economic Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance), within which you can freely choose majors. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (within 770), you can prioritize popular directions such as Business Administration and Accounting. If the ranking is close to the upper limit (about 968), it is recommended to choose directions such as Law, International Organizations and Global Governance as a safety option. In 2026, the History Category expands enrollment to 18 students, significantly increasing application opportunities compared to 2025.
